productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Printed White Tshirts
description: Composition White sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, distressed look graphic print on the front and a ribbed hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm and rugged is the perfect way to describe this white sweatshirt from status quo. This classic sweatshirt gets a dash of masculine edge with the distressed look graphic images and print on the front, while the soft fabric keeps you warm and comfortable. Team this with t-shirts and jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in sweatshirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
